title: Sealapack Simply Seal, Extra Strong, Heavy Duty Food Storage Bags, Pack Of 8 Bags
features: EXTRA STRONG, HEAVY DUTY DESIGN: These freezer bags are made from thick, durable plastic, designed to withstand the demands of daily kitchen use. Whether you're storing heavy cuts of meat or organising your fridge freezer, these bags won’t easily tear or puncture, keeping your food safe.

CONVENIENT ZIP LOCK CLOSURE: Featuring a secure ziplock, these food bags are easy to open and close, ensuring an airtight seal every time. Perfect for fridge organisers, they help keep food fresh for longer, whether you're storing sandwiches, leftovers, or bulk food.

PERFECT FOR FREEZING: These freezer bags are ideal for freezing portions of food, from meats and fish to pre-prepped veggies. Their heavy-duty design means they’re great for freezer storage, helping you keep your fridge freezer neat and organised.

VERSATILE STORAGE SOLUTION: Whether you're packing a lunch, freezing leftovers, or organising your fridge, these zip lock bags are versatile enough for every kitchen task. They’re perfect as sandwich bags for lunches or food storage bags for portioning out meal prep.

COMPACT SIZE, BIG STORAGE: Measuring approximately 18cm x 20cm, these plastic bags may seem small, but they provide plenty of room for sandwiches, snacks, and individual meal portions. Great for keeping the fridge freezer organised and clutter-free.
description: Sealapack Extra Strong Zip Lock Food Bags are the perfect household essential for every kitchen. Whether you're meal prepping, organising your fridge or freezer, or simply packing a lunch, these durable, heavy-duty plastic food bags are designed to keep your food fresh and secure. Measuring 18cm x 20cm, they offer ample space for storing a variety of items from sandwiches to leftovers, and even bulk portions of meat or vegetables. The convenient zip lock seal ensures a tight closure, helping to prevent leaks and spills, while also making them easy to open and close. These versatile storage bags are freezer-friendly, allowing you to easily portion out ingredients, saving time and reducing food waste. Whether you're freezing leftovers, batch cooking, or simply keeping your fridge organised, these food bags offer a reliable and efficient storage solution. Ideal for everyday use, they can be used to store fresh or cooked food, ensuring your meals stay fresh for longer. Perfect for busy households, they make meal planning a breeze by helping you organise your fridge and freezer with ease.
